title: Sous-Gratin Veggie Bliss
description: A spicy, crumbly Italian dish featuring roasted vegetables, prepared with sous-vide for a hangover-cure-friendly meal.
instructions: Slice onions and bell peppers thinly. Dice zucchini and butternut squash.
In a pan over medium heat, sauté garlic in olive oil until fragrant.
Add onion and bell pepper mix; cook for about 5 minutes or until vegetables soften slightly.
Mix in diced ingredients and spice mix according to taste.
Transfer to sous-vide pouches. Cook for 4 hours at 150°F (65°C).
Remove from sous-vide, let it cool a bit.
In a bowl, combine cooked vegetables with remaining olive oil and spice mix; mix well.
Spread vegetable mixture on top of the zucchini layer in a baking dish. Sprinkle vegan parmesan or nutritional yeast over the top if desired.
Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 25 minutes or until golden brown.
